append.description:
Only impacts inputs rendered when the `showInput` prop is set to `"inputWithPopover"`.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

prepend.description:
Only impacts inputs rendered when the `showInput` prop is set to `"inputWithPopover"`.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

levels.description:
Create colored indicators for certain intervals.
An array of {@link EuiRangeLevel} objects

isLoading.description: Only impacts inputs rendered when the `showInput` prop is set to `"inputWithPopover"`

fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

onChange.type: (values: [string | number, string | number], isValid: boolean, event?: _DualRangeChangeEvent) => void

step.description: The number to increment or decrement between each interval

compressed.description: Only impacts ticks rendered by `showTicks` or inputs rendered by `showInput`.

isInvalid.description: Only impacts inputs rendered by the `showInput` prop

inputPopoverProps.description:
Only impacts input popovers rendered when the `showInput` prop is set to `"inputWithPopover"`

Allows customizing the underlying [EuiInputPopover](/#/layout/popover#popover-attached-to-input-element),
except for props controlled by the range component

isDraggable.description: Creates a draggble highlighted range area

minInputProps.description: Intended to be used with aria attributes. Some attributes may be overwritten.

maxInputProps.description: Intended to be used with aria attributes. Some attributes may be overwritten.

tickInterval.description: Modifies the number of tick marks and at what interval

showInput.description:
Pass `true` to displays an extra input control for direct manipulation.
Pass `"inputWithPopover"` to only show the input but show the range in a dropdown.

showLabels.description: Shows static min/max labels on the sides of the range slider

showRange.description: Shows a thick line from min to value

showTicks.description: Shows clickable tick marks and labels at the given interval (`step`/`tickInterval`)
